MaxLineLength:EventDao.kt$EventDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM events WHERE type != 'CONVERSATION' AND (:keyword IS NULL OR title LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR description LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\' OR location LIKE '%' || :keyword || '%' ESCAPE '\\') ORDER BY time DESC")

MaxLineLength:MIGRATION_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `anniversaries_tmp` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `contactId` INTEGER, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isLunar` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isRepeat` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reminderDays` INTEGER NOT NULL, `remarks` TEXT, `icon` TEXT, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updatedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`contactId`) REFERENCES `contacts`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE)")

MaxLineLength:MIGRATION_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE circles_new (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, color TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '#6366F1', icon TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'people', waveform TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sine', parentCircleId INTEGER, intimacyThreshold INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, sortOrder INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, createdAt INTEGER NOT NULL, updatedAt INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:MIGRATION_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE event_participants_new (eventId INTEGER NOT NULL, contactId INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(eventId, contactId), FOREIGN KEY(eventId) REFERENCES events(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY(contactId) REFERENCES contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)")

MaxLineLength:MIGRATION_1_32.kt$<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE TABLE favorites_new (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, sourceType TEXT NOT NULL, sourceId INTEGER NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, createdAt INTEGER NOT NULL)")

MaxLineLength:MIGRATION_39_40.kt$<no name provided>$"INSERT INTO `contacts_new` (`id`, `name`, `avatar`, `nickname`, `gender`, `birthday`, `isLunarBirthday`, `isLeapMonthBirthday`, `knowingDate`, `phone`, `email`, `city`, `address`, `education`, `company`, `jobTitle`, `industry`, `hobby`, `habit`, `diet`, `skill`, `mbti`, `spouseName`, `childrenCount`, `childrenNames`, `introducer`, `relationshipLevel`, `relationship`, `groupId`, `intimacyScore`, `lastInteractionTime`, `customFields`, `notes`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`) SELECT `id`, `name`, `avatar`, `nickname`, `gender`, `birthday`, `isLunarBirthday`, `isLeapMonthBirthday`, `knowingDate`, `phone`, `email`, `city`, `address`, `education`, `company`, `jobTitle`, `industry`, `hobby`, `habit`, `diet`, `skill`, `mbti`, `spouseName`, `childrenCount`, `childrenNames`, `introducer`, `relationshipLevel`, `relationship`, `groupId`, `intimacyScore`, `lastInteractionTime`, `customFields`, `notes`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `contacts`"
